calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-14-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Mary O'Keeffe for and with Barbara Simon (Executor).

The Court stated that there is an issue with the request for additional compensation for locating heirs. Ms. O'Keeffe stated that Ms. Simon had worked with the Decedent for many years, that Ms. Simon looked for heirs, that Ms. Wilson had always told Ms. Simon that there wasn't anyone, and that she did ancestry.com, heir finders, looked through phone books, called people, etc. Ms. O'Keeffe also stated that this took a lot of time and that Ms. Simon's time has been well over the statutory fees. Ms. Simon also stated that her time was well over the statutory fees, that the heir search companies want a family tree, that she did not have one and that she has time sheets. The First and Final Report on Waiver of Account, etc. is under submission. Ms. Simon is to file the timesheets.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
